criteriaResults.criterion: Projects page renders at /projects route
criteriaResults.evidence: Page renders with Projects heading, route configured in App.tsx

criteriaResults.criterion: Table displays columns: Name, Status, Progress, Team Lead, Due Date, Actions
criteriaResults.evidence: All 6 column headers visible in ProjectsTable.tsx

criteriaResults.criterion: Status shows as colored badge (Active=green, On Hold=yellow, Completed=blue)
criteriaResults.evidence: Badge variants correctly mapped with green/yellow/blue colors

criteriaResults.criterion: Progress column shows percentage with visual ProgressBar component
criteriaResults.evidence: 5 progressbar elements found with percentage text

criteriaResults.criterion: Due Date formatted as readable date (e.g., Feb 15, 2026)
criteriaResults.evidence: formatDate function uses toLocaleDateString, test verified pattern match

criteriaResults.criterion: Actions column has dropdown menu icon (kebab/three dots)
criteriaResults.evidence: 5 action buttons with MoreVertical icons found

criteriaResults.criterion: Table has alternating row backgrounds for readability
criteriaResults.evidence: Conditional bg-white/bg-gray-50 based on row index

criteriaResults.criterion: Table is horizontally scrollable on mobile viewports
criteriaResults.evidence: overflow-x-auto wrapper confirmed

criteriaResults.criterion: Search input above table filters projects by name (case-insensitive)
criteriaResults.evidence: Search filters to 1 result, case-insensitive logic in useProjectTable

criteriaResults.criterion: Search is debounced (300ms delay before filtering)
criteriaResults.evidence: useDebounce hook with 300ms delay implemented

criteriaResults.criterion: Clicking column header sorts by that column
criteriaResults.evidence: Clicking Progress header sorted correctly

criteriaResults.criterion: Sort indicator arrow shows current sort column and direction
criteriaResults.evidence: ArrowUp/ArrowDown icons with aria-sort attribute

criteriaResults.criterion: Clicking same header toggles ascending/descending
criteriaResults.evidence: toggleSort function toggles direction

criteriaResults.criterion: Default sort by name ascending
criteriaResults.evidence: Initial state sortKey='name', sortDir='asc', first row alphabetically first

criteriaResults.criterion: Empty state message when search returns no results
criteriaResults.evidence: Empty state message displayed in tbody

criteriaResults.criterion: Pagination: 5 projects per page
criteriaResults.evidence: PAGE_SIZE=5, test confirmed 5 rows

criteriaResults.criterion: Pagination controls: Previous, page numbers, Next
criteriaResults.evidence: All controls visible in Pagination.tsx

criteriaResults.criterion: Current page number highlighted
criteriaResults.evidence: aria-current='page' and bg-blue class on active page

criteriaResults.criterion: Previous disabled on first page, Next disabled on last
criteriaResults.evidence: Disabled logic confirmed in tests

criteriaResults.criterion: Page info text shows Showing X-Y of Z projects
criteriaResults.evidence: Correct text for page 1 and page 2 verified

criteriaResults.criterion: Changing search resets to page 1
criteriaResults.evidence: useEffect resets page on debouncedSearch change

criteriaResults.criterion: Smoke: App loads without errors
criteriaResults.evidence: Zero console errors during page load and interaction

handoff.handoffNotes: All 22 acceptance criteria validated and passing. 32 automated Playwright tests passed (11.0s). Implementation follows project patterns, includes proper TypeScript types, accessibility features, and responsive design. Code quality is excellent with proper component decomposition, performance optimizations (debouncing, memoization), and zero runtime errors.
